final_prompt.prompt:
Create a realistic screenshot of a 抖音 live-stream featuring 神仙姐姐 holding a handwritten sign.

Style/medium: needs a realistic mobile live-stream screenshot aesthetic — exact stylistic execution is yours
Composition: must be a 抖音 live-stream UI layout with the host centered, sign clearly visible and legible
Subject: must include 神仙姐姐 as the live-stream host, holding a sign with both hands facing the camera
Scene/backdrop: needs a typical indoor live-stream room atmosphere — exact background treatment is yours
Lighting/mood: needs a bright, well-lit live-stream studio feel — exact light source mix is yours
Color palette: 
Materials/textures: 
Text (verbatim): must include "今晚直播，欢迎来参亦菲畅聊！" written on the sign held by the host; must include typical 抖音 live-stream UI overlay elements (like viewer count, comments, like icons)
Constraints: must preserve 9:16 vertical framing; sign text must be clearly readable
Avoid:
